Home / Sessions
What's on

Seven sessions a week, one rule every night.

Whatever's on the platter plays start to finish. Pick a night below, or book the back room for something private.

TuesdayBring Your Own Wax — 7–10pm
WednesdayQuiet listening — house selections, low volume
ThursdayResident Selector Night — Devika Rao, 7–11pm
FridayResident Selector Night — guest selector, 7–11pm
SaturdayResident Selector Night — Meher Anand, 7–11pm
SundaySlow Sunday — jazz & ambient, all day
MondayClosed — roasting day
The regular sessions

Three ways to spend an evening

Resident Selector Nights

Thu–Sat, 7–11pm. Our residents run a themed set from the shelves — no requests, just trust the selector. Different resident, different mood, every night.

Walk-in · no cover

Bring Your Own Wax

Tuesdays, 7–10pm. Bring up to 3 records from your own collection and take a 20-minute turn on the main system. Sign-up sheet at the counter from 6pm.

₹150 cover, includes filter coffee

Private Listening Room

Book the back room for a small group of up to 10 — your own crate, your own volume, snacks and pour-over on request. Great for birthdays and listening parties.

From ₹2,500 for 2 hours
Book the back room

Reserve the private listening room

Tell us the date, headcount, and what kind of night you're after — we'll confirm within a day.

Please enter your name.
Please enter a valid phone number.
Please choose a date.
Please select a group size.
Request received. We'll text or call to confirm your slot within 24 hours.
Before you come

A few things people usually ask

No — Resident Selector Nights and Slow Sunday are walk-in only, no cover charge. Tuesdays (Bring Your Own Wax) has a sign-up sheet at the counter from 6pm, first come first served.

Not during Resident Selector Nights — that's the whole point, you're trusting the selector's set. If you want to control the platter yourself, that's what Tuesdays and the private room are for.

Our staff handle every record on and off the platter — you won't need to touch the tonearm yourself. In four years we've had zero damage claims, and we intend to keep it that way.

Daytime bookings, sure. Evening sessions after 7pm tend to run later and louder, so we'd suggest an earlier slot if you're bringing little ones.

Not currently — we're coffee, tea, and a small food menu. The Tonearm Tonic is our answer to a proper evening drink, minus the alcohol.

Ready for a night in the room?

Walk in for a session, or book ahead for the back room.

Reserve a Table See the Menu
Static & Stems

A small vinyl listening bar and coffee roastery. One record at a time, played all the way through.
